# onelogin_user_mappings (Data Source)

Use this data source to list OneLogin User Mappings, with optional filtering.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "onelogin_user_mappings" "enabled" {
  enabled = true
}

output "enabled_mappings" {
  value = data.onelogin_user_mappings.enabled.mappings
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Filter by enabled status.
- `has_action` (String) Filter by action type (e.g., "set_role").
- `has_condition` (String) Filter by condition in the format "source:value" (e.g., "email:@test.com").

### Read-Only

- `mappings` (Attributes List) The list of user mappings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--mappings))

<a id="nestedatt--mappings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `mappings`

Read-Only:

- `actions` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--mappings--actions))
- `conditions` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--mappings--conditions))
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `id` (Number)
- `match` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `position` (Number)

<a id="nestedatt--mappings--actions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `mappings.actions`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String)
- `value` (List of String)


<a id="nestedatt--mappings--conditions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `mappings.conditions`

Read-Only:

- `operator` (String)
- `source` (String)
- `value` (String)
